items.title: Sam Neill’s Cause of Death Was Pneumonia, Actor’s Agent Confirms
items.summary: The beloved New Zealand actor best known for his turn in “Jurassic Park” had “fought and beaten” lymphoma before he fell ill, according to a statement.
